title: Poor Oral Hygiene and Periodontal Disease: 9 Herbal Essential Oils for a Solution
description: Zingiber officinale essential oils, extracted from the root of the ginger plant, have been found to possess anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties that can help combat periodontal disease. The essential oil contains constituents such as gingerol and shogaol, which have been shown to reduce inflammation and kill bacteria that contribute to the disease.
